/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/OWCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/OWInstance/OWInstance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/OWInstance/OWPart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/OWPlayerController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/OWRig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/OWWorld.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obbyware.dir/src/ObbywareMain.cpp.o -o obbyware  /usr/lib/libraylib.so.6.0.0 /usr/lib/libBulletDynamics.so /usr/lib/libBulletCollision.so /usr/lib/libLinearMath.so /usr/lib/libBulletSoftBody.so /usr/lib/libglm.a libowsolver/libowsolver.a -lm /usr/lib/libBulletDynamics.so /usr/lib/libBulletCollision.so /usr/lib/libLinearMath.so /usr/lib/libBulletSoftBody.so /usr/lib/libglm.a
